description: Mega Fortune Company Limited is an Internet of Things (IoT) solution provider based in Hong Kong. Through its subsidiary, QBS System, it offers a comprehensive portfolio of IoT integration, maintenance and support services, business process outsourcing, and trading solutions. The company focuses on helping enterprises in the Asia-Pacific region drive digital transformation, launch IoT initiatives, and upgrade legacy systems with new IoT technologies.
address: Unit 327, 3/F, 16W Science Park West Ave, Shatin, New Territories, Hong Kong
